basic_details.job_title: GCF Jabalpur Skilled Tradesman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gun Carriage Factory Jabalpur (GCF Jabalpur) has published the Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman Recruitment 2026 Notification on 04 July 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 02 Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years and holding qualifications such as Matriculation with NTC/NAC or Engineering Diploma/Degree in relevant trade/field along with minimum 02 years experience and Level-II certification in RG & MPI by ASNT/ISNT/BARC are eligible to apply online at the official portal. The application process will be active for 15 days from the da

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from date of publication of advertisement in employment news

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 03 Years Ex-Serviceman: Period of Military Service + 03 Years PWD: upto 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation and NTC/NAC or Engineering Diploma/Degree in relevant Trade/Field. Minimum 02 Years' Experience. Level-II certification in RG & MPI by ASNT / ISNT/ BARC.
qualification.details: Examiner (RG & MPI) Skilled: Matriculation and NTC/NAC or Engineering Diploma/Degree in relevant Trade/Field from recognized institutes from any Government/Private Organization having affiliation from Govt. Experience: At least 02 Years' Experience in relevant work area in a well reputed company/organization supported by experience certificate from the employer. A brief description about industry and activity performed during the previous employment, types of Machines worked on & Job manufactured along with the knowledge of programming (wherever applicable), tool selection experience/knowledge gained during previous engagement should be submitted by the candidate. The contract worker should be able to give output within 10 days' time from the date of his engagement in GCF. Additional Qualification: Level-II certification in RG & MPI by ASNT / ISNT/ BARC.

salary_details.details: Consolidated monthly salary (Rs.31840/- with current DA), inclusive of basic pay Rs. 19900/- and applicable Dearness Allowance (@ 60% at present). Annual increase of 3% during the tenure shall be admissible on the Basic Pay, subject to satisfactory performance. Personnel engaged will be eligible for EPF as per act and government guidelines. Personnel engaged will come under purview of The Employees' Compensation Act, 1923. HRA will be governed as per AWEIL policy, if Quarter is not provided by the unit.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GCF Jabalpur Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15 days from date of publication of advertisement in employment news.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GCF Jabalpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

GCF Jabalpur Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Examiner (RG & MPI) Skilled: Matriculation and NTC/NAC or Engineering Diploma/Degree in relevant Trade/Field from recognized institutes from any Government/Private Organization having affiliation from Govt. Experience: At least 02 Years' Experience in relevant work area in a well reputed company/organization supported by experience certificate from the employer. A brief description about industry and activity performed during the previous employment, types of Machines worked on & Job manufactured along with the knowledge of programming (wherever applicable), tool selection experience/knowledge gained during previous engagement should be submitted by the candidate. The contract worker should be able to give output within 10 days' time from the date of his engagement in GCF. Additional Qualification: Level-II certification in RG & MPI by ASNT / ISNT/ BARC.

content_sections.text: Consolidated monthly salary (Rs.31840/- with current DA), inclusive of basic pay Rs. 19900/- and applicable Dearness Allowance (@ 60% at present). Annual increase of 3% during the tenure shall be admissible on the Basic Pay, subject to satisfactory performance. Personnel engaged will be eligible for EPF as per act and government guidelines. Personnel engaged will come under purview of The Employees' Compensation Act, 1923. HRA will be governed as per AWEIL policy, if Quarter is not provided by the unit.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GCF Jabalpur Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the GCF Jabalpur Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman recruitment is 18th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by GCF Jabalpur?
faq.answer: GCF Jabalpur has released a total of 2 vacancies for the Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is Matriculation and NTC/NAC or an Engineering Diploma/Degree in a relevant trade/field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman post?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 18 to 35 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman position?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary is Rs. 31,840/- (with current DA), including a basic pay of Rs. 19,900/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 02 years of experience in the relevant work area is required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for UR and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for UR and OBC candidates is Rs. 200/- INR.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for SC, ST, and female candidates?
faq.answer: No, SC, ST, and female candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the GCF Jabalpur Skilled (Experienced) Tradesman recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website: https://vacancy.parasnet.com.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Trade Test/Interview and assessment of essential technical qualifications.
